revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:隠し湯]]
{{Source citation|date=April 2011}}
*{{ill|Secret hot spring|ja|秘湯|1=Secret hot spring|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Secret hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Secret hot spring|qq=}} *{{ill|Hidden hot spring|ja|隠し湯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hidden hot spring|qq=}} *{{ill|Drawn‐off hot spring|ja|引湯|1=Drawn‐off hot spring|2=ja|3=引湯|lt=Drawn‐off hot spring|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Drawn‐off hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Drawn‐off hot spring|qq=}} {{ill|User:Immanuelle|ja|User:Immanuelle|lt=Immanuelle|lt_ja=Immanuelle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|利用者‐会話:Immanuelle|lt=talk|lt_ja=会話|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User talk:Immanuelle|qq=}}) 20:51, 25 March 2025 (UTC)}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|利用者‐会話:Immanuelle|lt=talk|lt_ja=会話|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User talk:Immanuelle|qq=}}) 20:59, 25 March 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Kakushiyu''' (隠し湯) is a type of {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|qid=Q655311|lt=Onsen|1=Onsen}} in Japan that was exclusively used by local lords during the era of {{ill|Feudalism|en|Feudalism|qid=Q37739|lt=Feudalism|1=Feudalism}}. In some hot spring areas, it is also known as '''Kakareyu''' (隠れ湯). It is called "hidden hot spring" because it was kept from use by others. Although many are located in mountainous areas, there were also hot springs situated near the plains.
== Overview == The most famous kakushiyu is that of {{ill|Takeda Shingen|en|Takeda Shingen|qid=Q276404|lt=Takeda Shingen|1=Takeda Shingen}}. As his domain had many hot springs, they were utilized across his territory for the purpose of soldiers’ {{ill|Hot Spring Therapy|ja|湯治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Therapy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Thermal bath|qid=Q1004887}}. It is said that his rival, {{ill|Uesugi Kenshin|en|Uesugi Kenshin|qid=Q311080|lt=Uesugi Kenshin|1=Uesugi Kenshin}}, and the {{ill|Sanada clan|en|Sanada clan|qid=Q1002844|lt=Sanada Clan|1=Sanada clan}} who served under him also possessed many kakushiyu.
Nowadays, the term "kakushiyu" is often used in tourism promotions due to its connotations of historic hot springs, {{ill|Secret Hot Spring|ja|秘湯|1=Secret hot spring|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Secret Hot Spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Secret hot spring|qq=}}, and highly efficacious springs. Given the fame of the two aforementioned figures, catchphrases such as "Shingen’s Kakushiyu" and "Kenshin’s Kakushiyu" are frequently employed. On the other hand, because kakushiyu often have lower spring temperatures <ref>[https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/66583/ Shingen’s Kakushiyu: What is meant by "Cold Hot Spring"?] ({{ill|All About|ja|All About|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/All About|1=All About|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q45312519}})</ref>, and due to factors such as being located along riverbanks which often alter the water quality, many sites became problematic during the {{ill|2004|en|2004|qid=Q2014|lt=2004|1=2004}} {{ill|Onsen Adulteration Scandal|ja|温泉偽装問題|1=Onsen Fraud Controversy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Adulteration Scandal|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Fraud Controversy|qq=}}.
== Hot Springs Known as Kakushiyu == *'''Bold''' indicates locations where, since the Edo period, hot spring towns with ten or more lodging facilities have developed. * Hot springs marked with a ☆ are the so‐called "lukewarm springs" with an average spring temperature of less than 40°C, while those marked with a ★ have average spring temperatures below 25°C (classified as cold springs under the {{ill|Hot Spring Law|ja|温泉法|1=Onsen Act|1=Onsen Act|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Law|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Act|qq=}}).
=== Shingen's Kakushiyu === *'''{{ill|Shingen's Yu (Yumura Onsen)|ja|信玄の湯 湯村温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingen's Yu (Yumura Onsen)|1=Shingen-no-Yu Yumura Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11563592}}''' ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Kōfu|en|Kōfu|qid=Q201932|lt=Kofu City|1=Kōfu}}) * {{ill|Sekisui-ji Onsen|ja|積翠寺温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sekisui-ji Onsen|1=Sekisui-ji Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11597159}} ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Kōfu|en|Kōfu|qid=Q201932|lt=Kofu City|1=Kōfu}}) ☆ *'''{{ill|Shimobe Onsen|ja|下部温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimobe Onsen|1=Shimobe Spa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11361358}}''' ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|en|Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|qid=Q1131437|lt=Minamikoma District|1=Minamikoma District, Yamanashi}}{{ill|Minobu, Yamanashi|en|Minobu, Yamanashi|qid=Q1204435|lt=Minobu Town|1=Minobu, Yamanashi}}) * {{ill|Nishiyama Onsen|ja|西山温泉 (山梨県)|lt=Nishiyama Onsen|lt_ja=西山温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishiyama Onsen|1=Nishiyama Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11627877}} ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|en|Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|qid=Q1131437|lt=Minamikoma District|1=Minamikoma District, Yamanashi}}{{ill|Hayakawa, Yamanashi|en|Hayakawa, Yamanashi|qid=Q1204436|lt=Hayakawa Town|1=Hayakawa, Yamanashi}}) * {{ill|Akashi Onsen|ja|赤石温泉 (山梨県)|lt=Akashi Onsen|lt_ja=赤石温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akashi Onsen|1=Akaishi Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635858}} ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|en|Minamikoma District, Yamanashi|qid=Q1131437|lt=Minamikoma District|1=Minamikoma District, Yamanashi}}{{ill|Fujikawa, Yamanashi|en|Fujikawa, Yamanashi|qid=Q1351723|lt=Fujikawa Town|1=Fujikawa, Yamanashi}}) ★ * {{ill|Kawaura Onsen|ja|川浦温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaura Onsen|1=Kawaura Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q52329934}} ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Yamanashi (city)|en|Yamanashi (city)|qid=Q840610|lt=Yamanashi City|1=Yamanashi (city)}}) * {{ill|Masutomi Onsen|ja|増富温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masutomi Onsen|qq=}} ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Hokuto, Yamanashi|en|Hokuto, Yamanashi|qid=Q825272|lt=Hokuto City|1=Hokuto, Yamanashi}}) ☆ * {{ill|Iwashita Onsen|ja|岩下温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashita Onsen|1=Iwashita Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11474002}} ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Yamanashi (city)|en|Yamanashi (city)|qid=Q840610|lt=Yamanashi City|1=Yamanashi (city)}}) ☆ * {{ill|Tano Onsen|ja|田野温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tano Onsen|1=Tano Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11577482}} ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Kōshū, Yamanashi|en|Kōshū, Yamanashi|qid=Q248723|lt=Kōshū City|1=Kōshū, Yamanashi}}) ★ * {{ill|Saga Shio Kōsen|ja|嵯峨塩鉱泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga Shio Kōsen|qq=}} ({{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}{{ill|Kōshū, Yamanashi|en|Kōshū, Yamanashi|qid=Q248723|lt=Kōshū City|1=Kōshū, Yamanashi}}) ★ * {{ill|Matsushiro Onsen|ja|松代温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsushiro Onsen|1=Matsushiro Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11529234}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|qid=Q128849|lt=Nagano City|1=Nagano (city)}}, also known as {{ill|Kaga Onsen|ja|加賀井温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松代温泉|1=Matsushiro Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11529234}}) *'''{{ill|Shirakabe Onsen|ja|白骨温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirakabe Onsen|1=Shirahone Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10430635}}''' ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Matsumoto, Nagano|en|Matsumoto, Nagano|qid=Q213324|lt=Matsumoto City|1=Matsumoto, Nagano}}) * {{ill|Yokotani Onsen|ja|横谷温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokotani Onsen|1=Yokoya Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11543472}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Chino, Nagano|en|Chino, Nagano|qid=Q838660|lt=Chino City|1=Chino, Nagano}}) ★ * {{ill|Shibugotenyu Onsen|ja|渋御殿湯温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shibugotenyu Onsen|1=Shibu Goten-yu Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q52997998}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Chino, Nagano|en|Chino, Nagano|qid=Q838660|lt=Chino City|1=Chino, Nagano}}) ☆ * {{ill|Kotani Onsen|ja|小谷温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotani Onsen|1=Otari Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463761}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Kitaazumi District, Nagano|en|Kitaazumi District, Nagano|qid=Q1155067|lt=Kitaazumi District|1=Kitaazumi District, Nagano}}{{ill|Otari, Nagano|en|Otari, Nagano|qid=Q1204497|lt=Kotani Village|1=Otari, Nagano}}) *'''{{ill|Shibu Onsen|ja|渋温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shibu Onsen|1=Shibu Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11561642}}''' ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Shimotakai District, Nagano|en|Shimotakai District, Nagano|qid=Q1130962|lt=Shimotakai District|1=Shimotakai District, Nagano}}{{ill|Yamanouchi, Nagano|en|Yamanouchi, Nagano|qid=Q1204468|lt=Yamanouchi Town|1=Yamanouchi, Nagano}}) *'''{{ill|Umegashima Onsen|ja|梅ヶ島温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umegashima Onsen|1=Umegashima Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11538376}}''' ({{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|Shizuoka (city)|en|Shizuoka (city)|qid=Q174691|lt=Shizuoka City|1=Shizuoka (city)}}{{ill|Aoi-ku, Shizuoka|en|Aoi-ku, Shizuoka|qid=Q1131483|lt=Aoi Ward|1=Aoi-ku, Shizuoka}}) *'''{{ill|Hirayuyu Onsen|ja|平湯温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirayuyu Onsen|1=Hirayu Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483231}}''' ({{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|Takayama, Gifu|en|Takayama, Gifu|qid=Q622594|lt=Takayama City|1=Takayama, Gifu}}) Among the above, {{ill|Shimobe Onsen|ja|下部温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimobe Onsen|1=Shimobe Spa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11361358}}, {{ill|Nishiyama Onsen|ja|西山温泉 (山梨県)|lt=Nishiyama Onsen|lt_ja=西山温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishiyama Onsen|1=Nishiyama Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11627877}}, and {{ill|Umegashima Onsen|ja|梅ヶ島温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umegashima Onsen|1=Umegashima Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11538376}} are used as kakushiyu by {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}, who came to rule the area after the fall of the {{ill|Takeda clan|en|Takeda clan|qid=Q1210114|lt=Takeda Clan|1=Takeda clan}}.
=== Kenshin's Kakushiyu === *'''{{ill|Tsubame Onsen|ja|燕温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubame Onsen|1=Tsubame Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11569271}}''' ({{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}{{ill|Myōkō, Niigata|en|Myōkō, Niigata|qid=Q279642|lt=Myōkō City|1=Myōkō, Niigata}}) *'''{{ill|Seki Onsen|ja|関温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seki Onsen|1=Seki Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11656127}}''' ({{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}{{ill|Myōkō, Niigata|en|Myōkō, Niigata|qid=Q279642|lt=Myōkō City|1=Myōkō, Niigata}}) * {{ill|Renge Onsen|ja|蓮華温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renge Onsen|1=Renge Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11621752}} ({{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}{{ill|Itoigawa|en|Itoigawa|qid=Q857208|lt=Itoigawa City|1=Itoigawa}}) * {{ill|Kaikake Onsen|ja|貝掛温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaikake Onsen|1=Kaikake Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11634467}} ({{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}{{ill|Minami-Uonuma District, Niigata|en|Minami-Uonuma District, Niigata|qid=Q798772|lt=Minamiuonuma District|1=Minami-Uonuma District, Niigata}}{{ill|Yuzawa, Niigata|en|Yuzawa, Niigata|qid=Q1204269|lt=Yuzawa Town|1=Yuzawa, Niigata}}) ☆ * {{ill|Namaji Onsen|ja|生地温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Namaji Onsen|1=Ikuji Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11574479}} ({{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|qid=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture|1=Toyama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kurobe, Toyama|en|Kurobe, Toyama|qid=Q753864|lt=Kurobe City|1=Kurobe, Toyama}}) ★ *'''{{ill|Sarugakyo Onsen|ja|猿ヶ京温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarugakyo Onsen|1=Sarugakyō Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11572072}}''' ({{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}{{ill|Tone District, Gunma|en|Tone District, Gunma|qid=Q1077001|lt=Tone District|1=Tone District, Gunma}}{{ill|Minakami, Gunma|en|Minakami, Gunma|qid=Q1345518|lt=Minakami Town|1=Minakami, Gunma}}) * {{ill|Nanyosawa Onsen|ja|奈女沢温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanyosawa Onsen|1=Namezawa Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11444959}} ({{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}{{ill|Tone District, Gunma|en|Tone District, Gunma|qid=Q1077001|lt=Tone District|1=Tone District, Gunma}}{{ill|Minakami, Gunma|en|Minakami, Gunma|qid=Q1345518|lt=Minakami Town|1=Minakami, Gunma}}) <ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://www.town.tsukiyono.gunma.jp/kanko/onsen.html |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20050920050722/http://www.town.tsukiyono.gunma.jp/kanko/onsen.html |title=Tourist Information: Hot Springs & Lodging |publisher={{ill|Tsukiyono, Gunma|en|Tsukiyono, Gunma|qid=Q7850086|lt=Tsukiyono Town|1=Tsukiyono, Gunma}} |accessdate=2016-04-06 |archivedate=2005-09-20 }}</ref> <ref>{{Cite web|lang=ja|url=http://snow-country.jp/?a=contents&id=497 |title=Minakami Town Nanyosawa Onsen |publisher={{ill|Snow Country Tourism Promotion Council|ja|雪国観光圏推進協議会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snow Country Tourism Promotion Council|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |accessdate=2016-04-06 }}</ref>
=== Other Kakushiyu === *'''{{ill|Ikaho Onsen|ja|伊香保温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikaho Onsen|qq=}}''' ({{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}{{ill|Shibukawa, Gunma|en|Shibukawa, Gunma|qid=Q851492|lt=Shibukawa City|1=Shibukawa, Gunma}}) *'''{{ill|Bessho Onsen|ja|別所温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bessho Onsen|1=Bessho Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396788}}''' ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Ueda, Nagano|en|Ueda, Nagano|qid=Q844852|lt=Ueda City|1=Ueda, Nagano}}) * {{ill|Kakuma Onsen|ja|角間温泉 (上田市)|lt=Kakuma Onsen|lt_ja=角間温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakuma Onsen|1=Kakuma Onsen (Nagano)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11630884}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Ueda, Nagano|en|Ueda, Nagano|qid=Q844852|lt=Ueda City|1=Ueda, Nagano}}) ★ *'''{{ill|Kashizawa Onsen|ja|鹿沢温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kashizawa Onsen|1=Kazawa Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11677212}}''' ({{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}{{ill|Agatsuma District, Gunma|en|Agatsuma District, Gunma|qid=Q642394|lt=Agatsuma District|1=Agatsuma District, Gunma}}{{ill|Tsumagoi|en|Tsumagoi|qid=Q1203321|lt=Tsumagoi Village|1=Tsumagoi}})
